components.name: Cartoon Button
components.css: .ds-btn-cartoon { background: var(--orange); border: var(--border-thick); border-radius: var(--radius-md); box-shadow: var(--shadow-chunky); transition: transform 0.2s var(--ease-squish); } .ds-btn-cartoon:hover { transform: translateY(-4px) rotate(-1deg); background: var(--lime); }

components.name: Activity Card
components.description: White background, thick borders, playful rotation on hover.
components.html:
Cool Activity

Let's learn about space!
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: var(--border-thick); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); padding: 32px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-chunky); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-8px) rotate(1deg); }

narrative.overview: A digital playground where science feels like a toy. Thick outlines, warm colors, and bouncy movement.

rules.name: Anti-Blue Rule
rules.body: Pure blues are strictly prohibited. Use warm purples or oranges for space.

rules.name: Thick Outline Rule
rules.body: All containers must have a minimum 3px solid dark border.
